title: Silky Almond Halwa
description: A traditional Indian dessert made with ground almonds and silky texture. This halwa is creamy and sweet, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: 1. Heat ghee in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add ground almonds and cook until they are lightly toasted.
3. Add almond milk and bring to a simmer.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook for 5-7 minutes or until the mixture thickens.
5. Add brown sugar and cardamom powder. Mix well.
6. Cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the sugar dissolves.
7. Remove from heat and stir in rose water.
8. Let the mixture cool slightly, then refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
9. Serve chilled, garnished with sliced almonds if desired.
